title: Backtanked
description: A Modpack for the Backtank SMP
body:
This modpack is used for the **Backtanked SMP**, a community server centered around **economy**, **automation**, and **cooperation**.

> ### Key Features
> 1. Automate and set up factories with the help of the **Create Mod** (and many create add-ons)
> 2. With **Terralith** + **YUNG's Better structures** you can enjoy beatiful landscapes and monuments.
> 3. It's built with multiplayer in mind, including everything from Voice Chat to Land Claims
